case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. VICTOR MANUEL AGUILAR CAMPUZANO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT VICTOR MANUEL AGUILAR CAMPUZANO. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-02-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO AUG-18-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPUZANO, VICTOR MANUEL AGUILAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-17-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER - SENT TO PLAINTIFF / UNABLE TO FORWARD -
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED FEB-10-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPUZANO, VICTOR MANUEL AGUILAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-18-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-13-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 (W. TRUPEK 506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-13-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-29-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SANTA CASTILLO, ASSISTANT MANAGER. DEFENDANT VICTOR MANUEL AGUILAR CAMPUZANO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-17-2020 - CONTINUED TO JUN-02-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY ORDER OF THE COURT. (JR/506)
RETURN MAIL : SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER, SENT TO DEFENDANT. UNABLE TO FORWARD.
